title: Government Liaison Association of Disability Examiners (GLADE) — Constitution and Bylaws
description: Combined Constitution and Bylaws of the Government Liaison Association of Disability Examiners (GLADE), a chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) within the Mid-Atlantic Region whose membership is open to all persons working in the Federal Disability Determination Services (a federal/agency chapter rather than a single U.S. state). Articles I-XII cover name, affiliation, definitions (referencing the Mid-Atlantic Region MARADE), purpose, membership, finances and membership year (no chapter dues, rebates Feb 1-Mar 31), officers (President/President-elect/Secretary/Treasurer plus a two-year Regional Executive Board representative; May elections, June 1 terms), the Executive Board, committees (Membership, Program), general membership meetings, parliamentary authority, and amendments.
geographic_coverage: United States — Federal Disability Determination Services (Mid-Atlantic Region, NADE)

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Government Liaison (GLADE) Chapter
source.title: Constitution and Bylaws of the Government Liaison Association of Disability Examiners (GLADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'GLADE-Constitution-and-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect minor conversion artifacts (e.g. 'PARLIMENTARY' for Parliamentary). Content note: GLADE is NOT a U.S. state chapter despite living under 'state-bylaws' — it serves the Federal Disability Determination Services and is filed under the Mid-Atlantic Region. The document records 'Dated and completed: 11/17/1988' and 'Date of Approval: 03/20/1989', so temporal_coverage runs start=1988 to end=1989. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
